title: Minecraft Plus
description: A Kitchen Sink Modpack That Improves EVERYTHING About Minecraft!
body:
### *[Check out Stranded!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/strandedmc)*
### 📖Description
Minecraft Plus improves everything about Minecraft. From Combat⚔️ to Building⚒️, this modpack has something for everyone!
### ⭐Features
#### 🌎World Generation
To improve on the Minecraft world, this modpack adds Yung's Better Minecraft, The BetterX mods, Nullscape, and Wilder Wild, all of which improve how the structure generation, Nether and End biome generation, and Overworld biome generation look and feel.
#### 🐝Mobs
Minecraft Plus improves the Minecraft ecosystem with VillagersPlus, Illager Invasion, and the Bumblezone. Trade with villagers, fight illagers, and explore the Minecraft Plus ecosystem!
#### ⚡Optimization
Minecraft Plus optimizes the game with Sodium, Iris, More Culling, Lithium, Blanket, and ModernFix. All of which make sure this modpack can perform incredibly, even on a Potato🥔.
